caption: A man with dark hair pulled back and wearing glasses stands behind a podium in a room with tan blinds in the background. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with an open collar, a dark vest featuring blue floral embroidery, and a red beaded necklace. A black microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, including individuals with blonde, brown, and white hair. The logo "ORCA" appears in white text on a dark background on the right side of the scene. Across the sequence, the man shifts his gaze, initially looking down and then looking straight ahead toward the audience. He remains stationary behind the podium throughout the clip, with the other people in the foreground remaining still.
